home.heroText: We offer modern educational opportunities to prepare qualified and professional personnel for a successful future.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Learn more about our vocational education center
about.introTitle: Vocational Education for a Strong Future
about.introText: Our center provides modern vocational education that equips students with practical knowledge and professional skills aligned with real industry demands.
about.why1Text: Industry-oriented training programs designed for real-world experience.
about.why2Text: Experienced and qualified instructors dedicated to student success.
about.why3Text: Strong partnerships with companies offering real employment opportunities.
about.missionText: To develop skilled, competitive professionals equipped for the modern workforce.
about.visionText: To become a leading vocational education center in the region.

news.title: News
news.subtitle: Latest news about Jalilabad State Vocational Education Center

academic.title: Academic
academic.subtitle: Our educational opportunities
academic.educationText: Our center offers modern and practice-oriented vocational programs in various professional fields.
academic.admissionText: The admission process is transparent and simple. Candidates submit required documents and complete an interview stage.

career.title: Career Center
career.subtitle: Companies and vacancies
career.introText: Our center supports students’ integration into the labor market through strong partnerships with companies.

campus.title: Campus
campus.subtitle: Our Center
campus.block1Text: Kampusumuz müasir laboratoriyalar və praktik tədris otaqları ilə təchiz olunmuşdur.
campus.block2Text: Rahat və inkişaf yönümlü sosial mühit tələbələr üçün yaradılmışdır.
